query: SELECT e.programId, p.name as programName, COUNT(*) as totalEvents FROM events e LEFT JOIN programs p ON e.programId = p.id GROUP BY e.programId, p.name;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute SELECT e.programId, p.name as programName, COUNT(*) as totalEvents FROM events e LEFT JOIN programs p ON e.programId = p.id GROUP BY e.programId, p.name;
